title: Maryam Mirzakhani School of Mathematics and Science
tagline: 3-day foundational program in Mathematics and Science for primary students.
metaDescription: A 3-day foundational program in Mathematics and Science for primary students up to Class 5, building core problem-solving skills the playful, visual way.

title: BdMSO National Olympiad
tagline: Your child's path to representing Bangladesh at IMSO.
metaDescription: The official BdMSO National Olympiad - a 60-minute Math and Science exam for students Class 6 and below, and the pathway to represent Bangladesh at IMSO.
outcome: Qualifies for the National Residential Camp + TST
description: The BdMSO National Olympiad is the official Math + Science Olympiad - 60 minutes per subject, covering Mathematics and Science (50 + 50 = 100 marks). It is the only path into the National Residential Camp and, ultimately, Bangladesh's delegation to the International Mathematics & Science Olympiad (IMSO).

The exam runs at multiple regional venues across Bangladesh. Each program includes the National Anthem, the exam itself, a lunch break, a cultural program, and a prize-giving ceremony - so it's both an evaluation and a celebration of primary-school STEM.
what_youll_do: Sit a 60-minute exam per subject - Mathematics and Science (50 + 50 = 100 marks)
Compete at your nearest regional venue (Dhaka, Chattogram and more)
Take home a Participant T-shirt, ID, badge, sticker and Certificate of Participation
If you place in the top ~20–30%, you're designated a Winner and invited to the National Residential Camp
next_steps: Top ~20–30% of participants → Winners (medal + Certificate of Achievement)
Highest scorer in each section → Champion Trophy (Mathematics, Science, Combined)
Winners invited to the 3-day National Residential Camp
Camp graduates take the Team Selection Test (TST); top scorers form Bangladesh's IMSO delegation

title: BdMSO Quiz Competition
tagline: A general-knowledge quiz round for our youngest learners - open to Bangla and English mediums.
metaDescription: The BdMSO Quiz Competition - a friendly general-knowledge STEM round for pre-primary to Class 3, open to both Bangla and English mediums.
outcome: Certificate of Achievement for top scorers
description: The BdMSO Quiz Competition is an encouragement category for primary-school students up to Class 3 - designed to make their first competitive STEM experience welcoming, fun and curiosity-driven.

Unlike the National Olympiad, the Quiz does not lead to the National Camp or the TST - but it's open to both Bangla and English mediums and is the perfect first step for younger siblings or first-time competitors.
what_youll_do: Answer general-knowledge questions across Math, Science and curiosity-building topics
Compete at the same venue as the National Olympiad on the same day
Take home a Participant T-shirt, badge and Certificate of Participation
Top scorers receive a separate Quiz Champion certificate

title: STEM Foundation Program
tagline: The ultimate head start in Science, Technology, Engineering and Math - for Class 2 to 8.
metaDescription: The BdMSO STEM Foundation Program - a 24-class journey through Science, Technology, Engineering and Math for Class 2 to 8, taught in age-appropriate batches.
outcome: Strong foundational knowledge and analytical thinking
description: Give your child the ultimate head start with the BdMSO STEM Foundation Program. Designed for students from Class 2 to 8, this comprehensive 24-class journey introduces young minds to the wonders of Science, Technology, Engineering and Mathematics.

Rather than rote memorization, the program nurtures natural curiosity through interactive sessions, everyday examples, and foundational problem-solving. Students are divided into age-appropriate batches (Class 2–3, 4–6, 7–8) so each cohort moves at the right pace.
what_youll_do: Basic Science (Class 1–2): Intro to STEM, scientific method, measurement, lab basics
Chemistry (Class 3): States of matter, periodic table
Physics (Class 4–6): Newton's laws, energy, thermodynamics, electricity, simple machines
Math / Data (Class 7, 14): Coordinate geometry, data & graphs, intro to algebra
Coding (Class 8–9): Intro to Scratch, if/then logic, loops, debugging, game design
Astronomy (Class 10): Space, constellations, star formation
Earth & Environmental Science (Class 11–12)
Biology (Class 13, 15, 17): Ecosystems, human body, first aid
Genetics (Class 16): Introduction to DNA
Robotics (Class 18): Kids' AI and machine learning
Class 19: Online review session
Class 20: MASLab Experience (offline lab visit)

title: BdMSO Preparatory Course
tagline: Intensive 12-class Olympiad prep with 2 free mock tests · 31 May – 20 June 2026.
metaDescription: An intensive 12-class BdMSO Olympiad preparation course for Class 3 to 5, with advanced problem-solving and 2 free mock tests. Live online, 31 May to 20 June 2026.
outcome: Olympiad readiness + 2 free mock tests included
description: Take your Olympiad journey to the next level with the BdMSO Preparatory Course. This intensive 12-class program is meticulously crafted for students in Class 3 to 5 who are aiming to compete at the national level.

The structured training focuses heavily on advanced problem-solving, critical thinking, and Olympiad-style question patterns. Enrolling in this course also gives exclusive access to 2 free mock tests (6 June and 20 June 2026) to evaluate readiness.
what_youll_do: Class 1: Scientific thinking, measurements, experimental design
Class 2: Basics of life, plant science, health and metabolism
Class 3: Human anatomy and organ system - Part 1
Class 4: Human anatomy and organ system - Part 2
Class 5: Chemistry fundamentals, matter and fluids
Class 6: Forces and motion, energy and thermal properties
Class 7: Light and sound, electricity and magnetism
Class 8: Earth system, solar system, natural calamities
Class 9: Global geography, geography and Bangladesh
Class 10: Ecology and animal behaviour, environmental issues, conservation action
Class 11: Microbiology and genetics, biotechnology and modern science
Class 12: Review & final assessments
Math outline: announced soon
Free Mock Test 1: 6 June 2026 · Free Mock Test 2: 20 June 2026

options.help: Choose your subjects. Each option includes 2 free Mock Test sessions.

title: STEM Masterclass Series
tagline: Elite 4-class series for Class 5-6, bridging Olympiad prep to TST-level fluency.
metaDescription: An elite 4-class STEM Masterclass for Class 5-6 students, led by mentors and past Olympiad champions, bridging Olympiad prep to TST-level fluency.
outcome: TST-level fluency and advanced analytical skills
description: The STEM Masterclass Series is an elite, 4-class program designed for the brightest minds in Class 5 and 6. Led by renowned mentors and past Olympiad champions, this series dives deep into highly specialized, advanced topics.
Whether it's cracking complex number theory or designing flawless experiments, this program bridges the gap between standard Olympiad preparation and TST (Team Selection Test) level fluency.
what_youll_do: Detailed course outline coming soon

title: BdMSO Mock Test
tagline: Mock exam held on June 6th and June 20th to benchmark your skills and understand your standing. Available for Science, Math, or both subjects.
metaDescription: BdMSO Mock Tests on 6 and 20 June 2026 - on-site simulated exams in Math and Science that mirror the real Olympiad and benchmark your child's readiness.
outcome: Exam confidence and competitive leaderboard placement
description: Exam confidence comes from practice. The BdMSO Mock Test offers on-site, simulated exams designed to exactly mirror the pressure, time constraints and question patterns of the actual BdMSO.

Hosted at MASLab in Dhaka, these monthly tests help students master their time management and identify weak points before the main event. Detailed leaderboards and results are published after each test.
what_youll_do: BdMSO Mock Test 1 - Saturday, 6 June 2026 · 3:00–4:00 PM (Math) · 5:00–6:00 PM (Science)
BdMSO Mock Test 2 - Saturday, 20 June 2026 · 3:00–4:00 PM (Math) · 5:00–6:00 PM (Science)
Venue: MASLab, Dhaka
Detailed leaderboards and personal score breakdowns published after each test

options.label: BdMSO Mock Test sessions
options.help: Pick one or more sessions. Each subject is BDT 500.

title: Lab Day Workshop
tagline: An intensive, 6-hour laboratory experience that pulls Physics, Biology, and Chemistry concepts out of textbooks and into reality.
metaDescription: A hands-on 6-hour Lab Day Workshop for Class 3-6 at MASLab, with real Physics, Biology and Chemistry experiments. 31 July 2026, lunch and certificate included.
outcome: Real lab experience and practical knowledge
schedule: 31 July 2026 · MASLab · Lunch, snacks and certificate included
description: Step out of the textbook and into the laboratory! The Lab Day Workshop is a thrilling hands-on session where students get to act like real scientists. Covering essential experiments in Physics, Biology and Chemistry, this workshop emphasizes safety, precise measurements and the joy of witnessing science happen right before your eyes.
Date: 31 July 2026 · 10 AM to 6 PM at MASLab. Lunch, snacks and a certificate are included in the fee.
what_youll_do: Hour 1 - Lab Safety & Basics: equipment, safety protocols and precision measurement
Hour 2 - Chemistry in Action: safe chemical reactions, acid–base indicators, state changes
Hour 3 - The Microscopic World (Biology): prepare slides and use microscopes to observe plant/animal cells
Hour 4 - Physical Forces (Physics): hands-on experiments with pulleys, levers and basic optics
Lunch, snacks and a Certificate of Participation are all included

title: Kids AI and Machine Learning
tagline: An introductory, hands-on program where young learners bridge basic coding logic with real-world machine learning concepts.
metaDescription: A hands-on 12-class Kids AI and Machine Learning program for Class 4-6, where young learners explore electronics, sensors and coding to build their first robot.
description: Welcome to the future of technology. This Foundation Course is an introductory, highly interactive 12-class program that demystifies how machines work.

Students dive into basic electronics, understand how sensors perceive the world, and learn the fundamentals of physical computing. By the end of the course, every student will have built and programmed their very first functioning robot.
what_youll_do: Detailed course outline coming soon

title: SPSB Nature Camp
tagline: An activity-packed, 3-day residential camp coming up this December that turns the great outdoors into a living classroom.
metaDescription: The SPSB Nature Camp - a 4-day residential program of outdoor learning, ecology treks, stargazing and conservation projects for curious young explorers.
outcome: Real-world ecology skills and friends for life
description: Unplug and connect with the natural world! The SPSB Nature Camp is an exhilarating 4-day residential program focused on outdoor learning and environmental science.
what_youll_do: Day 1 - Basecamp Basics: arrival, orientation, tent setup and ice-breaker activities
Day 2 - Flora, Fauna & Ecology: guided forest treks, plant identification and bird watching
Day 3 - Astronomy & Survival: wilderness survival basics, campfires and guided stargazing sessions
Day 4 - Conservation Action: team projects on local environmental issues, awards and departure

title: International Summer/Winter Camp
tagline: 5-day residential camp with global STEM experts and BdMSO alumni · limited seats.
metaDescription: A 5-day international residential camp connecting young learners with global STEM experts and BdMSO alumni for mentorship and cross-cultural projects.
audience: Open to all (subject to selection · limited seats)
description: Broaden your horizons with our prestigious International Summer/Winter Camp. This 5-day residential experience brings together brilliant young minds, global STEM experts and distinguished BdMSO alumni.

It is a rare opportunity to gain international exposure, collaborate on cross-cultural projects, and receive direct mentorship from individuals who have excelled on the global stage. Seats are highly limited.
what_youll_do: Detailed outline coming soon

title: BdMSO Exchange Program
tagline: The pinnacle - 30-day international exchange for top BdMSO performers, by invitation only.
metaDescription: The BdMSO Exchange Program - a 30-day international academic exchange for top-performing BdMSO students, by invitation only. Real international research exposure.
audience: Top BdMSO students (by invitation / rigorous selection only)
outcome: Ultimate international exposure and collaborative research
description: The pinnacle of the BdMSO experience. The exclusive 30-day Exchange Program is reserved for the absolute top-performing students in the BdMSO pipeline.

This international exchange immerses students in a foreign academic environment, fostering collaborative learning with elite peers from across the globe. It is a transformative journey that shapes future scientists and global leaders.
what_youll_do: Detailed outline coming soon
